steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage establishes the 900 is so rare that every successful execution is historic. The blank must connect that rarity to the consequence: Brusco and Pappas becoming titans. The transition must signal cause-and-effect.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'In conclusion': wraps up multiple points — no cause-effect signal. ✗
  • Choice B — 'By comparison': introduces a comparison, not a consequence. ✗
  • Choice C — 'For this reason': directly signals that what follows results from what came before — rarity → reverence. ✓
  • Choice D — 'Regardless': signals contrast or dismissal, the opposite of what's needed. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
